    Hi,

    I am new here so I'm sorry if the question has been already answered. I was looking for Vix threads and found nothing.

    I am able to download videos from Vix getting the mpd and license url from devtools in firefox, then the keys on getwvkeys.cc.

    Since the show I want to download has around 600 episodes what I am trying to do is for a list of video urls from vix, generate the manifest url, use getwvkeys API to get the keys and finally use N_m3u8DL-RE to download and decrypt the videos.

    I have noticed the manifest url is something like:

    Code:
    https://dcs-vod.mp.lura.live/vod/p/session/manifest.mpd?i=i176972148-n5bdfa68e-f8af-4132-aa2d-07956a81af2c&guid=89e6e2bd-958b-4830-524531d7d24f

    Which returns a json with the full url to the manifest. But the problem I have is that I don't now how `encp` parameter is calculated. I guess it is some video information encrypted but I could not find it.

    The video I am using to test is:

    https://vix.com/es-es/video/video-4152473

    And you need a US or Latam vpn/ip to access it.

    Thank you!

    The keys to the video you posted:
    Code:
    --key 01fe32fc937aaec006db44d94b0852bd:597edc513aa5bc386164fbc163c5037e
--key 00fe32fc937aaec006db44d94b0852bd:b3d40088b2abbb0d22520f8359232d15
--key 02fe32fc937aaec006db44d94b0852bd:042d0ccb0c96807809704844b1fb5f4b
    Anyway, you can ask ChatGPT to help you write a script to make these fuctions happen automatically. And you should try to learn building your own script, I mean locally, rather than relying on a website. Integrating your local script with third-party downloader like yt-dlp or N_m3u8DL-RE (https://github.com/nilaoda/N_m3u8DL-RE/) would be a much better choice. But my humble advice would be: Don't think about batch download if you are still a beginner, try getting the keys one by one first. Downloading is not a big deal 'cause there are many tools.

    P.S. There's nothing wrong if you want to use GetWVkeys because they also provide APIs.

    I think you didnâ€™t get my message. I know how to get the keys and I know how to download and the tools required. Iâ€™m just asking how to get manifest url from the video url using the command line. Please if possible re-read my message


    You get it from a request to:
    Code:
    https://tkx.mp.lura.live/rest/v2/mcp/video/4152473?anvack=GAmN765ORsrVpoGIW6Ik9pB7CqVjJx4j&anvtrid=wac8eeb1d651afd209e539f42654ea752&rtyp=fp&X-Anvato-Adst-Auth=d6FcTzjUAJ7n7dTb1JT8XvoVaH1bk9udKt7MSjqAhybKI7I5ZLexwJXxJ9FkttnJ1rVnrfspJ9WhizssUw6sIA==
    As you can see, you need the anvack, anvtrid and X-Anvato-Adst-Auth token
    You can get these by performing other requests, your best bet is to clear the networktab in the developer tools, refresh the page and work your way backwards, starting from where you get the MPD. You can look for requests that give you URL's and tokens for requests that come later.
    Those who know, need not ask for help
